headline: Amazon Blocks 1,800 Suspected North Korean Job Applicants
summary: Amazon says it blocked over 1,800 suspected North Korean job applicants using fake identities as authorities crack down on "laptop farm" schemes.

headline: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan Calls 2025 'Defining Year' As Stock Soars 79%, Nvidia And SoftBank Deals Fuel Turnaround Despite Trump Conflict
summary: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan said 2025 was a defining turning point for the company as major AI funding deals with Nvidia and SoftBank, a 79% stock surge and improving financial results helped fuel Intel's turnaround despite political scrutiny and conflict concerns.

headline: Bernie Sanders Slams 'Immoral and Unsustainable' Wealth Inequality, Calls To End Oligarchy Amid Soaring Billionaire Fortunes
summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders has criticized the growing wealth disparity in the country, citing the staggering increase in the fortunes of a few billionaires.
